rationale: This is a block-puzzle "SMART/GENIUS/PSYCHOPATH" satisfaction hook — the visual language (grid filling, green palette, IQ-tier text overlay) belongs to casual puzzle/woodoku-style games, not a 3D PvP archery duel. Frictions: no aiming/trajectory, no character, no weapon fantasy, and the audience it pulls (casual puzzle players, often older/female-skewing) is misaligned with Archery Clash's young-male competitive PvP target. Skip this archetype unless you're testing a deliberate broad-audience puzzle-bait hook with a hard pivot to archery gameplay in seconds 3-5, and even then expect poor post-install retention.
